qa_pairs.question: What is important to remember about YAML formatting when creating cloudInit scripts for virtual machines?
qa_pairs.answer: YAML is very particular about white space formatting, so you must include a space after the hyphen before your public key string in a cloudInit script.

qa_pairs.question: What happens to the default user if a custom cloudInit script is specified during the creation of a new virtual machine?
qa_pairs.answer: If a custom cloudInit script is specified, it overwrites the default user that would normally be added, meaning only the users explicitly listed in your configuration script will be present on the newly created virtual machine.

qa_pairs.question: When defining users with a cloudInit script for a new virtual machine, what is a vital consideration regarding user permissions?
qa_pairs.answer: It is vital to ensure that at least one user defined in the cloudInit script has sudo permissions, as the script overwrites default users, making the listed users the only ones on the new virtual machine.
